title: More Bookshelf Variants 3D
description: Adds 3D modeled elements to LioOn Studio's More Bookshelf Variants mod.
body:
# More Bookshelf Variants 3D

This is a simple resource pack to add a 3D effect to the bookshelves added by LieOn Studio's More Bookshelf Variants mod. This is based on the 3D bookshelf resource pack created by Stridey on the VanillaTweaks web site.

![Two tall row of bookshelves showing subtle 3D effect on books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83bb1d245b4f39718a616e71840fcec9628f56e.png)
